description: This file defines a repository class for managing allocations in a database, specifically handling PostgreSQL operations related to asset allocations, including creation, retrieval, updates, transfers, and decision-making workflows. It interacts with SQLAlchemy ORM models and utilizes async database sessions.

classes.name: AllocationsRepository
classes.description: Repository class providing asynchronous methods for CRUD operations and workflows related to asset allocations in a PostgreSQL database.

methods.name: dict[str,Any]|None get_by_id(self, allocation_id: UUID)
methods.description: Retrieve an allocation by its unique UUID.

methods.name: dict[str,Any]|None get_active_by_asset(self, asset_id: UUID)
methods.description: Retrieve an active allocation associated with a specific asset UUID.

methods.name: list[dict[str,Any]] list(self, user_id: UUID | None = None, limit: int = 100, offset: int = 0)
methods.description: List allocations with optional filtering by user ID, with pagination support.

methods.name: dict[str,Any] create_allocation( self, *, asset_id: UUID, to_user_id: UUID, notes: str | None, actor_user_id: UUID | None )
methods.description: Create a new allocation record for an asset to a user, with optional notes and actor identification.

methods.name: dict[str,Any]|None mark_returned(self, allocation_id: UUID, notes: str | None)
methods.description: Mark an allocation as returned, updating its status and notes.

methods.name: dict[str,Any]|None create_transfer_request( self, allocation_id: UUID, to_user_id: UUID, notes: str | None, requested_by: UUID )
methods.description: Initiate a transfer request for an allocation to another user, setting the transfer status.

methods.name: dict[str,Any]|None decide_transfer( self, allocation_id: UUID, decision: str, decided_by: UUID, notes: str | None )
methods.description: Approve or reject a transfer request, updating status, possibly creating a new allocation, and transferring ownership.

ctags.name: create_allocation
ctags.signature: ( self, *, asset_id: UUID, to_user_id: UUID, notes: str | None, actor_user_id: UUID | None )

ctags.name: create_transfer_request
ctags.signature: ( self, allocation_id: UUID, to_user_id: UUID, notes: str | None, requested_by: UUID )

ctags.name: decide_transfer
ctags.signature: ( self, allocation_id: UUID, decision: str, decided_by: UUID, notes: str | None )

ctags.name: get_active_by_asset
ctags.pattern: /^    async def get_active_by_asset(self, asset_id: UUID) -> dict[str, Any] | None:$/

ctags.name: get_by_id
ctags.pattern: /^    async def get_by_id(self, allocation_id: UUID) -> dict[str, Any] | None:$/

ctags.name: list
ctags.pattern: /^    async def list(self, user_id: UUID | None = None, limit: int = 100, offset: int = 0) -> list/
ctags.signature: (self, user_id: UUID | None = None, limit: int = 100, offset: int = 0)

ctags.name: mark_returned
ctags.pattern: /^    async def mark_returned(self, allocation_id: UUID, notes: str | None) -> dict[str, Any] | No/
